name: Release
description: Environments-as-a-Service platform for creating ephemeral full-stack preview environments from pull requests.

seo.title: Release — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Release: Environments-as-a-Service platform for creating ephemeral full-stack preview environments from pull requests.

when_to_use: Ephemeral full-stack preview environments per PR
Environments-as-a-Service with database and service clones
Share staging links with stakeholders before merging
Auto-teardown environments when PRs are closed

pros: Full-stack preview environments from pull requests
Supports complex multi-service apps, not just frontends
Good fit for QA and sales demos
cons: Setup for complex topologies takes real effort
review.verdict: The serious pick for ephemeral full-stack previews when Netlify/Vercel can't model your backend.
review.best_for: Backend-heavy teams wanting per-PR environments with DBs, queues, and services.
review.not_for: Frontend-only apps where Vercel or Netlify preview deploys already suffice.
